info.name: Management API
info.description:
If you have UI/UX requirements specific to your business/application domain, you can build a custom campaign manager application on top of Moloco’s Management API. The management API allows you to perform ad campaign-related operations such as creating/updating ad campaigns and pulling report data.

You need to set below environment variables to use this collection

- `mgmt_url` : Moloco's staff will provide accurate host information.
    
- `mgmt_api_key` : Please review the [API Key ](https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/docs/api-and-sso-credential-management) guide for information on generating an API key
    
- `platform_id` : Moloco's staff will provide platform_id information.
    

API reference: [https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/reference/rmpmanagementapi_listadaccounts](https://mcm-docs.moloco.com/reference/rmpmanagementapi_listadaccounts)

body.raw:
{
  "campaign_id": "CAMPAIGN_ID",  // The id of the campaign that owns this campaign review.
  "brand_entity_type": "BRAND_ENTITY_TYPE",
  "brand_entity_id": "BRAND_ENTITY_ID",  // Brand entity id of the review. It must be asset id or landing page id.
  "review_status": "REVIEW_STATUS",
  "rejection_reason": "REJECTION_REASON"  // If the review status is rejected, this field must contain the reason for rejection.
}

{
  "campaign_id": "CAMPAIGN_ID",  // The id of the campaign that owns this campaign review.
  "campaign_reviews": [  // Campaign reviews bulk update information.
    {  // Definition of a campaign review.
      "ad_account_id": "AD_ACCOUNT_ID",  // The id of the ad account that owns this campaign review. It is platform-specific ad account id. Value and format can vary according to each Platform.
      "campaign_id": "CAMPAIGN_ID",  // The id of the campaign that owns this campaign review.
      "brand_entity_type": "BRAND_ENTITY_TYPE",
      "brand_entity_id": "BRAND_ENTITY_ID",  // Brand entity id of the review. It must be asset id or landing page id.
      "review_status": "REVIEW_STATUS",
      "rejection_reason": "REJECTION_REASON",  // If the review status is rejected, this field must contain the reason for rejection.
      "created_at": "CREATED_AT",  // Created timestamp. This field is automatically set during the creation process and should not be modified by the API user.
      "updated_at": "UPDATED_AT"  // This field represents the last time the campaign review was modified. The system sets this value internally for you when you create or update a campaign review, so make sure this value matches the latest updated_at you received the campaign review.
    }
  ]
}

{
  "campaign_id": "CAMPAIGN_ID",  // The id of the campaign that owns this campaign review.
  "campaign_review": {  // Definition of a campaign review.
    "ad_account_id": "AD_ACCOUNT_ID",  // The id of the ad account that owns this campaign review. It is platform-specific ad account id. Value and format can vary according to each Platform.
    "campaign_id": "CAMPAIGN_ID",  // The id of the campaign that owns this campaign review.
    "brand_entity_type": "BRAND_ENTITY_TYPE",
    "brand_entity_id": "BRAND_ENTITY_ID",  // Brand entity id of the review. It must be asset id or landing page id.
    "review_status": "REVIEW_STATUS",
    "rejection_reason": "REJECTION_REASON",  // If the review status is rejected, this field must contain the reason for rejection.
    "created_at": "CREATED_AT",  // Created timestamp. This field is automatically set during the creation process and should not be modified by the API user.
    "updated_at": "UPDATED_AT"  // This field represents the last time the campaign review was modified. The system sets this value internally for you when you create or update a campaign review, so make sure this value matches the latest updated_at you received the campaign review.
  }
}

formdata.description: Provide the video file when using upload by file method. Do not use this parameter if 'object_key' parameter is provided. Format: MP4, Size: 300MB max.
Provide the object key when using upload by session method. Do not use this parameter if 'file' parameter is provided. Obtained from CreateBulkVideoUploadSession response.

item.name: UserDataDeletionRequest
item.description: Requests for the User data deletion request. We process the request by deleting the user event data in the batch job.

exec: // Function to generate a UUID with a timestamp
